acceptance_criteria.description: Users must be unable to access any page without first logging in with valid credentials.
kane_steps: Navigate directly to https://www.saucedemo.com/inventory.html without logging in
Observe that the user is redirected back to the login page
Confirm that the inventory page content is not accessible
acceptance_criteria.kane_one_liner: Protected pages redirect unauthenticated users to login

acceptance_criteria.description: After submitting valid credentials (standard_user / secret_sauce), the user is redirected to the product inventory page.
kane_steps: Navigate to https://www.saucedemo.com/
Enter username 'standard_user' and password 'secret_sauce'
Click the Login button
Verify the URL changes to /inventory.html and the inventory page is displayed
acceptance_criteria.kane_one_liner: Successful login redirects user to inventory page

acceptance_criteria.description: The inventory page displays product tiles each containing a product name, image, and price.
kane_steps: Log in with valid credentials and navigate to the inventory page
Inspect each product tile on the page
Verify every tile shows a visible product name, an image, and a price
acceptance_criteria.kane_one_liner: Inventory tiles show name, image, and price

acceptance_criteria.description: Clicking a product name on the inventory page opens the product detail page for that product.
kane_steps: Log in and navigate to the inventory page
Click the name text of any product
Verify the product detail page opens for the selected product
acceptance_criteria.kane_one_liner: Clicking product name opens detail page

acceptance_criteria.description: Clicking a product image on the inventory page opens the product detail page for that product.
kane_steps: Log in and navigate to the inventory page
Click the image of any product
Verify the product detail page opens for the selected product
acceptance_criteria.kane_one_liner: Clicking product image opens detail page

acceptance_criteria.description: The product detail page displays the product name, description, price, and an 'Add to cart' button.
kane_steps: Log in and navigate to the inventory page
Click on any product to open its detail page
Verify the page shows the product name, a description, the price, and an 'Add to cart' button
acceptance_criteria.kane_one_liner: Detail page shows name, description, price, add button

acceptance_criteria.description: Users can add a product to the cart from the inventory page by clicking the 'Add to cart' button on a product tile.
kane_steps: Log in and navigate to the inventory page
Click the 'Add to cart' button on any product tile
Navigate to the cart page and verify the product appears in the cart
acceptance_criteria.kane_one_liner: Add to cart button adds product from inventory

acceptance_criteria.description: After clicking 'Add to cart' on a product tile, the button label for that product changes to 'Remove'.
kane_steps: Log in and navigate to the inventory page
Note the button label reads 'Add to cart' for a product
Click the 'Add to cart' button
Verify the button label for that product now reads 'Remove'
acceptance_criteria.kane_one_liner: Button label changes to Remove after adding

acceptance_criteria.description: The cart badge in the top navigation updates to reflect the current number of items in the cart after adding a product.
kane_steps: Log in and navigate to the inventory page
Note the cart badge count (or its absence)
Click 'Add to cart' on one or more products
Verify the cart badge displays the correct total number of added items
acceptance_criteria.kane_one_liner: Cart badge count updates after adding items

acceptance_criteria.description: Users can remove a product from the cart directly from the inventory page by clicking the 'Remove' button.
kane_steps: Log in, navigate to the inventory page, and add a product to the cart
Click the 'Remove' button on the same product tile
Navigate to the cart page and verify the product is no longer listed
acceptance_criteria.kane_one_liner: Remove button removes product from inventory page

acceptance_criteria.description: After clicking 'Remove' on a product tile, the button label changes back to 'Add to cart'.
kane_steps: Log in, navigate to the inventory page, and add a product to the cart
Confirm the button label reads 'Remove'
Click the 'Remove' button
Verify the button label reverts to 'Add to cart'
acceptance_criteria.kane_one_liner: Button label reverts to Add to cart after removing

acceptance_criteria.description: Users can navigate to the cart page at /cart.html.
kane_steps: Log in and navigate to the inventory page
Click the cart icon in the top navigation
Verify the URL changes to /cart.html and the cart page is displayed

acceptance_criteria.description: The cart page lists all previously added items, each showing the item name, quantity, and price.
kane_steps: Log in, add one or more products to the cart from the inventory page
Navigate to the cart page at /cart.html
Verify every added item is listed with its name, quantity, and price
acceptance_criteria.kane_one_liner: Cart page lists items with name, quantity, price

acceptance_criteria.description: A sort dropdown is visible in the top right of the inventory page allowing users to sort products.
kane_steps: Log in and navigate to the inventory page
Locate the sort dropdown in the top right area
Verify the dropdown is visible and interactive
acceptance_criteria.kane_one_liner: Sort dropdown is present on inventory page

acceptance_criteria.description: The sort dropdown contains exactly four options: Name (A to Z), Name (Z to A), Price (low to high), and Price (high to low).
kane_steps: Log in and navigate to the inventory page
Click the sort dropdown to open it
Verify the four expected options are present and no others are shown
acceptance_criteria.kane_one_liner: Sort dropdown contains all four expected options

acceptance_criteria.description: Selecting 'Price (low to high)' sorts the product list so the cheapest product (Sauce Labs Onesie at $7.99) appears first.
kane_steps: Log in and navigate to the inventory page
Select 'Price (low to high)' from the sort dropdown
Verify the first product displayed is 'Sauce Labs Onesie' priced at $7.99
acceptance_criteria.kane_one_liner: Price low-to-high sort shows Onesie first

acceptance_criteria.description: Selecting 'Name (A to Z)' sorts the product list alphabetically so that 'Sauce Labs Backpack' appears first.
kane_steps: Log in and navigate to the inventory page
Select 'Name (A to Z)' from the sort dropdown
Verify the first product displayed is 'Sauce Labs Backpack'
acceptance_criteria.kane_one_liner: Name A-to-Z sort shows Backpack first
